phases.title: Phase 0: 环境检查
phases.notes: Java 21 OK, pnpm 11.7.0, Docker Compose v5.1.4. JaCoCo实际79.75%/57.56%超CI阈值. Prometheus依赖已在pom.xml+endpoint已暴露. SQL CI已接入. 备份脚本+Prometheus编排均需新建.

phases.title: 模块 A: JaCoCo 风险解除
phases.notes: A1: JaCoCo 79.8%/57.6% vs CI 73%/53% — 不阻塞. A2: pom.xml阈值与文档同步. A3: 可选P1跳过. mvn verify BUILD SUCCESS.

phases.title: 模块 B: SQL 安全门禁
phases.notes: B1: CI sql-safety-scan job已存在(ci.yml 167-173行). B2: 豁免机制+误报处理文档写入docs/11-安全规范.md. check-sql-safety.ps1 PASS.

phases.title: 模块 C: Prometheus 监控
phases.notes: C1: micrometer-registry-prometheus依赖已在pom.xml, endpoint已暴露. C2: deploy/monitoring/prometheus.yml + docker-compose.monitoring.yml + 运维手册更新.

phases.title: 模块 D: 备份恢复
phases.notes: D1: scripts/mysql-backup.ps1 (全量+保留策略). D2: scripts/mysql-restore.ps1 (恢复+健康检查). .env.example备份变量. 运维手册更新.
